title: [Bug]: dup — Build fails on macOS, same issue someone else reported earlier today
body: I think this is a duplicate of an issue that was filed earlier today and already closed — I see the same exact error message (linker fails in the cmake step on ESP32-S3, fresh-checkout build, macOS 14.5) and the title of the earlier one was something like 'cmake link step fails'. I'm not refiling because I think there's a NEW bug; I'm refiling because the closure didn't actually fix it on my side. Mark this as a duplicate and reopen the original if helpful.
_notes: Fixture deliberately phrases the duplication in textual terms ('same issue someone else reported earlier today', 'mark this as a duplicate') rather than via a specific issue # reference, so DeepSeek can classify based on the user's stated intent without needing to verify against the repo's actual issue history.
